name: Inox Wind Limited
summary: Inox Wind Limited is an Indian wind energy solutions provider, manufacturing wind turbine generators (WTGs) and providing related services, including project development, engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC). The company aims to promote sustainable energy and provides end-to-end solutions to Independent Power Producers (IPPs), utilities, and Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs). Inox Wind Limited is based in Noida, India.
